name: Google / YouTube

specs.multi_asset: Requires multiple headlines and descriptions for UAC machine learning

platform_exclusive_logic.The_Skip_Breaker: Break the 4th wall in the first 2s (e.g., character pointing at the skip button saying 'Wait!').
platform_exclusive_logic.Search_Intent: Align creative with search keywords. If they search for 'Strategy', show 'Deep Combat Mechanics'.
platform_exclusive_logic.Audio_Storytelling: YouTube is a 'sound-on' platform. High-quality narration and cinematic soundtracks are mandatory.

psychological_hooks: Expert Authority: 'Professional Gamer Review' style or 'Developer Commentary'.
The 5-Second Challenge: 'If you can solve this in 5s, you are a genius. [Timer starts now]'.
Cinematic Immersion: High-quality lore and world-building that looks like a movie trailer.
focus: Immediate Intrigue (First 5s) > Brand Authority > High-intent Search
